GenAiFunction.description:
Schedule a task to run at a SPECIFIC FUTURE TIME or on a RECURRING CRON schedule. Saves a numbered plan + cron expression; the plan fires headlessly at that time and notifies the user.
Use when the user says: - "every Monday at 9am", "daily", "weekly", "every morning", "first of the month" - "tomorrow at 3pm", "on March 2", "in two days" - "remind me", "schedule", "do this later at [time]"
NOT for: - Running something NOW in the background — use RunMyOrgButler (no schedule required). - Simple fast tasks the agent can do inline — just do them.
Inputs: - prompt: numbered plan. Must start with the headless preamble ("You are running headlessly. There is no conversation — do not ask questions, NEVER create another plan from here, and execute every step in this plan."). Step 1 must call LoadCustomInstructions. Last step must call NotifyUser. Include all record IDs directly in the steps — no conversation context is available at execution time. - schedule: cron pattern "minute hour dayOfMonth month dayOfWeek optionalYear" in the user's local time. Examples: "0 9 ? * MON-FRI" weekdays 9am, "30 14 ? * MON" Mondays 2:30pm, "0 8 1 * ?" first of month 8am, "0 15 28 2 ? 2026" Feb 28 2026 at 3pm.
Results are delivered as in-app notifications: plain text only, max 750 chars, one clickable record via targetId, no links/markdown. If the user requests something that exceeds these limits (linked lists, large reports), explain the constraint before scheduling.
